pos-write.title: 09 POS Write
pos-write.last_task: HE Captain POS 10% offer V2 fix
pos-write.last_summary: Diagnosed Captain POS offer bug on test.hamzahotel.com: old offer 44 chained through Captain base pricelist 40 and dropped portion attribute extras, causing apparent 45-55% discounts. Created pricelist 45 HE Captain AC 10% Offer V2 - 2026-05-24 with 168 non-chained rules, switched only Captain config 6 from [40,44] to [40,45], verified Cash [41,42] and Ground [41,43] unchanged, and post-switch exhaustive variant audit passed 252 cases with 0 anomalies.
pos-write.next_action: Staff should reload Captain POS and select HE Captain AC 10% Offer V2 - 2026-05-24 for new Captain offer orders; verify tablet canaries Chicken Kabab Half about ₹198.60, Chicken Kabab Full about ₹400.30, Irani Chicken Full about ₹522.34. Rollback if needed: restore Captain config 6 available pricelists to [40,44].
pos-write.mutation_status: Odoo/POS production mutation completed on HE test.hamzahotel.com: created detached pricelist 45 + 168 rules, then updated only pos.config 6 available_pricelist_ids to [40,45]. No product/tax/category/KDS/session/Cash/Ground writes. Backups: /private/tmp/he_captain_offer_v2_write_backup_20260524.json and /private/tmp/he_captain_v2_live_switch_backup_20260524.json.
